_header.file_role: provenance sidecar for llama31_8b.json (E1 anchor fleet)

S1.name: meta-llama/llama-models (official Meta GitHub), models/sku_list.py, llama3_1_8b arch_args

S3.name: The Llama 3 Herd of Models, arXiv:2407.21783v3, Table 3 (architecture hyperparameters) + Section 3 text (128K vocab, RoPE base 500,000, GQA 8 KV heads)

S4.name: meta-llama/llama-models, models/llama3_1/MODEL_CARD.md (release date, 128k context, GQA, 15T+ tokens)

ffn_dim.source: S2 official formula: int(2*(4*4096)/3)=10922; int(1.3*10922)=14198; round up to multiple 1024 -> 14336; cross-check S3 Table 3 (FFN Dimension 14,336)

vocab_size.source: S1 (LLAMA3_VOCAB_SIZE = 128256 constant), S3 text (vocabulary with 128K tokens)

rope_scaling.value: llama3-type, factor 8, 8192 -> 131072; NOT representable in AC schema 0.3, encoded as method none + original_max_position 8192

tied_embeddings.source: S1/S2 (Llama 3 reference implementation uses separate tok_embeddings and output projections)

pretrain_context.source: S1 (use_scaled_rope with original 8k), S3 (8k pretraining context extended to 128K)

total_params_b.source: computed with AC parameter ledger from S1/S3 dims; consistent with S4 model class (8B)

notes: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B on Hugging Face is license-gated (HTTP 401 on raw config.json without an accepted-license token), so the gated config.json was NOT used; every field above comes from Meta's official GitHub repository and the arXiv paper, both public.
Serving anchor will use HF repo meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B (base); requires HF_TOKEN with accepted Llama 3.1 Community License on the rented node.
